Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Class OfxV2Writer

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer
public class OfxV2Writer extends Object
Provides utility methods to write OFX (Open Financial Exchange) version 2.0 compliant XML files. This class uses StAX (Streaming API for XML) to generate the OFX content, allowing for efficient writing of large OFX files. It supports writing sign-on information, banking transactions, credit card transactions, and investment account details.

    static class 
    OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo

    OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData
    Inner class to hold data for investment account information used in OFX sections.
    static class 
    OfxV2Writer.InvestmentPosition
    Describes a single investment holding, such as a stock or mutual fund position.
    static class 
    OfxV2Writer.InvestmentTransactionData
    Describes a single investment transaction entry within the statement.
    static class 
    OfxV2Writer.SecurityData
    Identifies a security referenced by investment transactions and positions.
    static class 
    OfxV2Writer.SignonData
    Inner class to hold data for the OFX sign-on section.
    static class 
    OfxV2Writer.TransactionData
    Inner class to hold data for a single transaction, used by the OFX writer methods.

    static void
    writeOfxFile(String filePath, OfxV2Writer.SignonData signon, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> bankTxns, OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo bankInfo, BigDecimal bankLedgerBalance, String bankLedgerAsOf, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> creditCardTxns, OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo ccInfo, BigDecimal ccLedgerBalance, String ccLedgerAsOf, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData investment)
    Writes a complete OFX 2.0 file, potentially including sign-on, banking, credit card, and investment sections.

  • Method Details

    • writeOfxFile

      public static void writeOfxFile(String filePath, OfxV2Writer.SignonData signon, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> bankTxns, OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo bankInfo, BigDecimal bankLedgerBalance, String bankLedgerAsOf, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> creditCardTxns, OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo ccInfo, BigDecimal ccLedgerBalance, String ccLedgerAsOf, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData investment) throws Exception
      Writes a complete OFX 2.0 file, potentially including sign-on, banking, credit card, and investment sections.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path where the OFX file will be created or overwritten.
      signon - The OfxV2Writer.SignonData containing sign-on message details.
      bankTxns - A list of OfxV2Writer.TransactionData for bank account transactions. Can be null or empty if no banking section is needed.
      bankInfo - The OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo for the bank account section. Required if bankTxns is provided.
      bankLedgerBalance - The ledger balance for the bank account. Required if bankTxns is provided.
      bankLedgerAsOf - The 'as of' date string for the bank ledger balance. Required if bankTxns is provided.
      creditCardTxns - A list of OfxV2Writer.TransactionData for credit card transactions. Can be null or empty.
      ccInfo - The OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo for the credit card section. Required if creditCardTxns is provided.
      ccLedgerBalance - The ledger balance for the credit card account. Required if creditCardTxns is provided.
      ccLedgerAsOf - The 'as of' date string for the credit card ledger balance. Required if creditCardTxns is provided.
      investment - The OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData for the investment section. Can be null if no investment section is needed.
      Throws:
      Exception - If any IO error occurs during file writing or XML stream processing.
